description: This file defines multiple UI components for a React frontend, including Container, Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardBody, Badge, and ProgressBar, each with styling and properties typical for layout and visual elements.

methods.name: Container
methods.description: A responsive container component that centers content with maximum width constraints.

methods.name: Card
methods.description: A styled section component representing a card with border and shadow.

methods.name: CardHeader
methods.description: A header component for Card with flex layout.

methods.name: CardTitle
methods.description: A heading component styled for card titles.

methods.name: CardBody
methods.description: A container for card content with padding.

methods.name: Badge
methods.description: A small badge component with variably styled background and text based on variant prop.

methods.name: ProgressBar
methods.description: A visual progress bar component displaying a percentage value with label.
